mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(partitioncount) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(partitioncount) / 1e8, 2) END AS dailyIncrement, CASE WHEN SUM(tableallcount) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(tableallcount) / 1e8, 2) END AS dataTotalVolume FROM synlte.syndmg_table_all WHERE DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(INSERTEDDATATIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m%d')
mapper.delete: delete from DGN_PROPERTY_LARGE where type = #{type} and Save_flag=#{saveFlag}
mapper.select: SELECT secondary_organization_ch AS name, COUNT(DISTINCT table_name_en) AS tableCount, SUM(YESTERDAY_COUNT) AS tableDataVolume FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE primary_organization_ch = '原始库' AND statistics_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{dateStr}, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY secondary_organization_ch

SELECT DISTINCT secondaryClassifyCh FROM ( SELECT v1.codeid AS mainClassifyId, v1.codetext AS mainClassifyCh, v2.codeid AS primaryClassifyId, v2.codetext AS primaryClassifyCh, v3.codeid AS secondaryClassifyId, v3.codetext AS secondaryClassifyCh FROM ( SELECT CODEID, CODENAME, CODETEXT, PARCODEID FROM v_classify_info WHERE codetext = '数据组织分类' ) AS v1 LEFT JOIN v_classify_info AS v2 ON v1.codeid = v2.PARCODEID LEFT JOIN v_classify_info AS v3 ON v2.codeid = v3.PARCODEID ) AS subquery WHERE primaryClassifyCh = '原始库'

select c.field_class as fieldClassId, c.valtext as fieldClassCh, count(distinct a.objectid) as tableCount from (SELECT s.field_class, s.fieldid, b.valtext FROM (select field_class, fieldid from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where field_class is not null and deleted = 0) s left join (select valvalue, valtext from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid = 'JZCODEGAZDFL') b on s.field_class = b.valvalue) c left join (select fieldid, objectid from synlte.objectfield where deleted = 0) a on c.fieldid = a.fieldid group by valtext, field_class

select count(distinct a.objectid) as tableCount from (SELECT s.field_class, s.fieldid, b.valtext FROM (select field_class, fieldid from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD where field_class is not null and deleted = 0) s left join (select valvalue, valtext from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid = 'JZCODEGAZDFL') b on s.field_class = b.valvalue) c left join (select fieldid, objectid from synlte.objectfield where deleted = 0) a on c.fieldid = a.fieldid
select valvalue as fieldClassId, valtext as fieldClassCh, 0 as tableCount from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid = 'JZCODEGAZDFL'

select tableNameEn, tableCount as useHeatCount, case when name is null then tablename else name end showName from (select distinct project || '.' || tablename as tableNameEn, project, tablename, tableCount, name from (select l.project, l.tablename, sum(l.table_use_count) as tableCount from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT l INNER JOIN synlte.object r on upper(l.TABLENAME) = upper(r.TABLENAME) group by l.project, l.tablename) s1 left join (select table_name_en, table_project, name from (select row_number() over(partition by table_name_en, table_project order by STATISTICS_TIME desc) rn, table_name_en, table_project, name from DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS) where rn = 1) s2 on upper(s1.project) = upper(s2.table_project) and upper(s1.tablename) = upper(s2.table_name_en) order by tableCount desc) where rownum <= 5

select appid as tableNameEn , sysname as showName, useSum as useHeatCount from( select t.areaid, t.organname, t.appid, t.sysname, sum(t.incr) as useSum from v_sysoper_log_incr t where t.sysname is not null group by t.areaid, t.organname, t.appid, t.sysname order by useSum desc ) where rownum <= 5
SELECT si_citycode AS dz, COUNT(DISTINCT SD_ID) AS totalTypes, SUM(si_count) AS totalcount FROM STANDARDIZE.STATINFODIS WHERE si_updatetime >= STR_TO_DATE(#{todayStr}, '%Y%m%d') GROUP BY si_citycode;

SELECT city_code FROM ( SELECT city_code FROM bscdata.city WHERE pro_id = ( SELECT pro_id FROM bscdata.province WHERE pro_name = #{provinceName} ORDER BY pro_id ASC LIMIT 1 ) ORDER BY city_code ASC ) AS subquery LIMIT 1
select count(*) from di_job where jobstatus != 'deleted'
select count(*) from synlte.object_store_info osi where import_flag = 1
select CITY_ABB as cityAbb ,CITY_CODE as cityCode , CITY_NAME as cityName from DGN_CITY_ABB

SELECT DATA, CREATE_TIME AS createTime, TYPE, SAVE_FLAG AS saveFlag FROM ( SELECT DATA, CREATE_TIME, TYPE, SAVE_FLAG, @row_num := IF(@prev_type = TYPE, @row_num + 1, 1) AS num, @prev_type := TYPE AS dummy FROM DGN_PROPERTY_LARGE ORDER BY TYPE DESC, SAVE_FLAG DESC ) AS subquery WHERE num = 1

SELECT SUM(totalNums) AS allCount, SUM(totalSize) AS allSize FROM ( SELECT secondary_organization_ch AS label, COUNT(*) AS tables, CASE WHEN SUM(table_all_count) IS NULL OR SUM(table_all_count) = '' THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(SUM(table_all_count) / 1e8) END AS totalNums, CASE WHEN SUM(table_size) IS NULL OR SUM(table_size) = '' THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(SUM(table_size) / 1073741824) END AS totalSize FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE statistics_time >= date(NOW()) AND primary_organization_ch = '原始库' AND table_type = 'odps' GROUP BY secondary_organization_ch ) AS c

SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(tableallcount) IS NULL OR SUM(tableallcount) = '' THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(FLOOR(SUM(tableallcount)/1e8)/(#{days} + 1)) END AS allCount, CASE WHEN SUM(tablesize) IS NULL OR SUM(tablesize) = '' THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(FLOOR(SUM(tablesize)/1073741824)/(#{days} + 1)) END AS allSize, CASE WHEN SUM(partitioncount) IS NULL OR SUM(partitioncount) = '' THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(FLOOR(SUM(partitioncount)/1e8)/(#{days} + 1)) END AS partitionAllCount, CASE WHEN SUM(partitionsize) IS NULL OR SUM(partitionsize) = '' THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(FLOOR(SUM(partitionsize)/1073741824)/(#{days} + 1)) END AS partitionAllSize FROM ( SELECT sta.tabletype, sta.tableallcount, sta.tablesize, sta.partitioncount, sta.partitionsize, sta.inserteddatatime, ciad.primaryorganizationch FROM ( SELECT * FROM synlte.syndmg_table_all WHERE DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(inserteddatatime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - ${days}, '%Y%m%d') ) AS sta LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT sjxjbm, tablename, primaryorganizationch FROM classify_interface_all_date ) AS ciad ON UPPER(sta.tablename)=UPPER(ciad.tablename) ) AS a WHERE a.primaryorganizationch = '原始库' AND a.tabletype IN (1,5,12);

SELECT partitionAllCount, partitionAllSize, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(insertDate, '%Y%m%d'), '%m/%d') AS insertDate FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(partitioncount) IS NULL OR SUM(partitioncount) = '' THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(SUM(partitioncount)/1e8) END AS partitionAllCount, CASE WHEN SUM(partitionsize) IS NULL OR SUM(partitionsize) = '' THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(SUM(partitionsize)/1073741824) END AS partitionAllSize, DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(inserteddatatime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') AS insertDate FROM ( SELECT sta.tabletype, sta.tableallcount, sta.tablesize, sta.partitioncount, sta.partitionsize, sta.inserteddatatime, ciad.primaryorganizationch FROM ( SELECT * FROM synlte.syndmg_table_all WHERE DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(inserteddatatime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - ${days}, '%Y%m%d') ) AS sta
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT sjxjbm, tablename, primaryorganizationch FROM classify_interface_all_date ) AS ciad ON UPPER(sta.tablename)=UPPER(ciad.tablename) ) AS a WHERE a.primaryorganizationch = '原始库' AND a.tabletype IN (1,5,12) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(inserteddatatime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(inserteddatatime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%Y%m%d') ASC ) AS x

SELECT c.label AS label, d.tables AS tables, IFNULL(FLOOR(c.totalNums), 0) AS totalNums FROM ( SELECT secondary_organization_ch AS label, COUNT(*) AS tables, CASE WHEN SUM(table_all_count) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(SUM(table_all_count) / 100000000) END AS totalNums FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE statistics_time >= date(NOW()) AND secondary_organization_ch IN ('原始汇集库', '原始标准库') AND LOWER(table_type) = 'odps' GROUP BY secondary_organization_ch ) c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT secondary_organization_ch AS label, COUNT(*) AS tables FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT table_name_en, secondary_organization_ch FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE statistics_time >= date(NOW()) AND secondary_organization_ch IN ('原始汇集库', '原始标准库') AND LOWER(table_type) = 'odps' ) sub GROUP BY secondary_organization_ch ) d ON c.label = d.label UNION ALL SELECT a.label AS label, b.tables AS tables, IFNULL(FLOOR(a.totalNums), 0) AS totalNums FROM ( SELECT primary_organization_ch AS label, COUNT(*) AS tables, CASE WHEN SUM(table_all_count) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(SUM(table_all_count) / 100000000) END AS totalNums FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE statistics_time >= date(NOW()) AND primary_organization_ch IN ('资源库', '主题库', '知识库', '业务库') AND LOWER(table_type) = 'odps' GROUP BY primary_organization_ch ) a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT primary_organization_ch AS label, COUNT(*) AS tables FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT table_name_en, primary_organization_ch FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE statistics_time >= date(NOW()) AND primary_organization_ch IN ('资源库', '主题库', '知识库', '业务库') AND LOWER(table_type) = 'odps' ) sub GROUP BY primary_organization_ch ) b ON a.label = b.label;

SELECT jobname AS warnName, '执行失败' AS warnContent, DATE_FORMAT(maxTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS warnTime FROM ( SELECT jobname, MAX(createtime) AS maxTime FROM di_job_batch_record WHERE status = 'fail' AND createtime >= date(NOW()) GROUP BY jobid, jobname ) AS subquery ORDER BY maxTime DESC

SELECT label, COUNT(*) AS value, className FROM ( SELECT table_name_en, vci.codeText AS label, CASE WHEN o.secretlevel = '01' THEN '公开' WHEN o.secretlevel = '02' THEN '一般' WHEN o.secretlevel = '03' THEN '重要' WHEN o.secretlevel = '04' THEN '特殊' ELSE '其他' END AS className FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT table_name_en, datasource_last_level FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE statistics_time >= date(NOW()) AND secondary_organization_ch IN ('原始汇集库') AND LOWER(table_type) = 'odps' ) AS toa LEFT JOIN synlte.object o ON UPPER(toa.table_name_en) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = UPPER(o.tablename) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LEFT JOIN v_classify_info vci ON toa.datasource_last_level COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = vci.codeid COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ) AS x WHERE x.className != '其他' AND x.label IS NOT NULL GROUP BY label, className;

select '来源单位' as label, count(*) as value,'个' as unit from (select distinct routine_code as value from ds_detected_table where routine_code is not null) a union all select '来源系统' as label, count(*) as value,'个' as unit from (select distinct app_code from ds_detected_table where app_code is not null) b

SELECT operator_net AS operatorNet, data_type AS dataType, SUM(records_all) AS recordsAll FROM ( SELECT operator_net, data_type, records_all FROM DGN_INSPECT_OPERATORS WHERE (operator_net, data_type, netmode, citycode, tablename) IN ( SELECT max_partition_subquery.operator_net, max_partition_subquery.data_type, max_partition_subquery.netmode, max_partition_subquery.citycode, max_partition_subquery.tablename FROM ( SELECT operator_net, data_type, netmode, citycode, tablename, MAX(`partition`) AS max_partition FROM DGN_INSPECT_OPERATORS GROUP BY operator_net, data_type, netmode, citycode, tablename ) AS max_partition_subquery JOIN DGN_INSPECT_OPERATORS AS t ON t.operator_net = max_partition_subquery.operator_net AND t.data_type = max_partition_subquery.data_type AND t.netmode = max_partition_subquery.netmode AND t.citycode = max_partition_subquery.citycode AND t.tablename = max_partition_subquery.tablename AND t.partition = max_partition_subquery.max_partition ) ) AS filtered_data GROUP BY operator_net, data_type;

SELECT l.name, l.standTableCount, IFNULL(r.tableCount, 0) AS tableCount, IFNULL(r.tableDataVolume, 0) AS tableDataVolume FROM ( SELECT secondaryorganizationch AS name, COUNT(DISTINCT tablename) AS standTableCount FROM classify_interface_all_date WHERE UPPER(sjyjfl) = CONCAT(#{sjzzflCodeId}, #{type}) GROUP BY secondaryorganizationch ) AS l LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sub_organization_name AS name, SUM(object_count) AS tableCount, SUM(records_all) AS tableDataVolume FROM ( SELECT l.organization_type, l.sub_organization_name, l.object_count, l.records_all, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CONCAT( l.organization_type, '_', l.sub_organization_type, '_', l.valvalue ) ORDER BY l.partition DESC ) AS rn FROM dgn_inspect_organization_stat l WHERE l.organization_type = #{type} ) AS sub WHERE sub.rn = 1 AND sub.sub_organization_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sub.sub_organization_name ) AS r ON l.name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = r.name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci

SELECT SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH AS name, SUM(yesterday_count) AS tableCount FROM ( SELECT @row_num := IF(@prev_group = CONCAT(table_name_en, '_', table_project), @row_num + 1, 1) AS rn, @prev_group := CONCAT(table_name_en, '_', table_project) AS dummy, table_name_en, table_project, yesterday_count, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS, (SELECT @row_num := 0, @prev_group := '') vars WHERE DATE_FORMAT(STATISTICS_TIME, '%Y%m%d') = #{dateStr} AND PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '原始库' ORDER BY table_name_en ASC, table_project ASC, STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) subquery WHERE rn = 1 GROUP BY SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH;
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM dgn_inspect_organization_stat WHERE STR_TO_DATE(`partition`, '%Y-%m-%d') < date(NOW()) - INTERVAL 15 DAY
delete from DGN_INSPECT_OPERATORS where STR_TO_DATE(`partition`, '%Y-%m-%d') < date(NOW()) - INTERVAL 15 DAY
delete from DGN_DISTRIBUTION_STATISTIC where STR_TO_DATE(STATISTICTIME, '%Y-%m-%d') < date(NOW()) - INTERVAL 15 DAY;
mapper.select: select distinct labelcode,labelname from synlte.labels where labellevel = #{level}

SELECT l.name, l.tableCount, COALESCE(r.tableDataVolume, 0) AS tableDataVolume FROM ( SELECT secondaryorganizationch AS name, COUNT(DISTINCT tablename) AS tableCount FROM classify_interface_all_date WHERE primaryorganizationch = '原始库' GROUP BY secondaryorganizationch ) AS l LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r2.name, SUM(r2.table_all_count) AS tableDataVolume FROM ( SELECT row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY table_name_en, table_project ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC) AS rn, table_name_en, table_project, table_all_count, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH AS name FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE STATISTICS_TIME >= SYSDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = '原始库' ) AS r2 WHERE r2.rn = 1 GROUP BY r2.name ) AS r ON l.name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = r.name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

SELECT NAME, tableCount, IFNULL(tableDataVolume, 0) AS tableDataVolume FROM ( SELECT name, COUNT(DISTINCT TABLENAME) AS tableCount, SUM(table_all_count) AS tableDataVolume FROM ( SELECT r.project_name, l.TABLENAME, CASE WHEN r1.labelname IS NULL THEN l.sjzybq5 ELSE r1.labelname END AS name FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT sjxjbm, TABLENAME, sjzybq5 FROM synlte.PUBLIC_DATA_INFO WHERE sjzybq5 IS NOT NULL AND zyzt = '1' AND sjxjbm IS NOT NULL AND SUBSTR(UPPER(sjxjbm), 1, 11) = 'JZ_RESOURCE' AND UPPER(SJZZYJFL) = #{sjzzflCodeId} ) l INNER JOIN ( SELECT tablename, tableid, objectname FROM synlte.OBJECT WHERE deleted = 0 AND relate_tablename = 'OBJECTFIELD' ) o ON UPPER(l.sjxjbm) = UPPER(o.tableid) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_name, tablename FROM synlte.OBJECT_STORE_INFO WHERE project_name IS NOT NULL AND SUBSTR(UPPER(project_name), 1, 4) = 'YSK_' ) r ON UPPER(l.TABLENAME) = UPPER(r.tablename) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT labelcode, labelname FROM synlte.labels WHERE labellevel = 5 ) r1 ON UPPER(l.sjzybq5) = UPPER(r1.labelcode) ) ll LEFT JOIN ( SELECT table_name_en, table_project, table_all_count FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY table_name_en, table_project ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) AS rn, table_name_en, table_project, table_all_count FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE STATISTICS_TIME > SYSDATE() - INTERVAL 2 DAY ) sub WHERE sub.rn = 1 ) rr ON UPPER(ll.project_name) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = UPPER(rr.table_project) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND UPPER(ll.TABLENAME) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = UPPER(rr.table_name_en) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci GROUP BY name ) t;

SELECT tableNameEn, tableNameCh, tableCount, tableSize FROM ( SELECT LOWER(CONCAT(table_project, '.', table_name_en)) AS tableNameEn, CASE WHEN l.tableNameCh IS NOT NULL THEN l.tableNameCh ELSE r.objectname END AS tableNameCh, tableCount, tableSize FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT table_project, table_name_en, TRIM(name) AS tableNameCh, CAST(table_all_count AS UNSIGNED) AS tableCount, table_size AS tableSize FROM DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS WHERE statistics_time >= date(NOW()) AND table_name_en IS NOT NULL AND table_all_count IS NOT NULL AND ( LOWER(table_type) IN ('odps', 'hive', 'hdfs', 'clickhouse') OR LOWER(table_type) LIKE '%hive%' ) ) l INNER JOIN ( SELECT objectname, tablename FROM synlte.object WHERE objectstate = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND relate_tablename = 'OBJECTFIELD' ) r ON UPPER(l.table_name_en) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = UPPER(r.tablename) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ORDER BY tableCount DESC ) t LIMIT 8;
select count(distinct PLATFORM) as registerPlatformCount, sum(INTERFACE_NUM) as registerServiceCount,sum(SUMTOTAL) as publishServiceInfoCount from DGN_PUYUANMESSAGEBUS
